note: PancakeSwap IFO harvestPool(uint8 _pid) — CLAIM after sale end: delivers the offering-token allocation for pool _pid AND returns the oversubscription overflow refund (committed minus allocation cost, minus tiered overflow tax) to msg.sender in the same call. Maps to launchpad::ClaimAllocation (platform=pancakeswap_ifo, recipient=$from — harvestPool pays msg.sender, NO recipient arg). The bundled overflow refund is represented inside the claim_allocation refund_due live_input, NOT a separate Refund body — PancakeSwap has no standalone refund() selector. selector 0x2374876c keccak-verified (cast sig) AND confirmed on the BscScan-verified IFOV2 instance. live_inputs (allocated/refund_due/is_claimable) are user_supplied placeholders (no IFO allocation enrichment wired; viewUserOfferingAndRefundingAmountsForPools is the candidate source for a follow-up).
